data.title: 国际服2026年愚人节礼物
data.summary: Sensei, I heard that all the overtime you've been working gave you a nightmare. What? Total Assault
data.body:
Sensei, I heard that all the overtime you've been working gave you a nightmare.

What? Total Assault bosses were acting bashful and shy towards you? How awful! Please take these gifts to help you recover from your bad dream.

We hope this will be a small consolation for what you went through! 💫

➡️ See details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3403459

#BlueArchive
